final:
module dram_cell (
    input wire clk,
    input wire we, // write enable
    input wire [15:0] data_in, // data input
    output reg [15:0] data_out // data output
);
    reg [15:0] shadow_memory; // 16-bit shadow_memory cell

    always @(posedge clk) begin
        if (we) begin
            shadow_memory <= data_in; // Write data to shadow_memory
        end
    end

    always @(negedge clk) begin
        data_out <= shadow_memory; // Read data from shadow_memory
    end
endmodule
